message:
chore(deps): bump asupersync 0.2.5 → 0.3.0 (crates.io v0.3.0)

Brings the sibling asupersync dependency (workspace-level and fuzz
harness) up to the v0.3.0 release published on crates.io, matching
the rest of the franken-* stack's coordinated bump.

- Cargo.toml: `asupersync = "0.2.5"` → `"0.3.0"` at [workspace.dependencies].
  All `asupersync = { workspace = true }` consumers across ffs-* crates
  resolve through this one bump.
- fuzz/Cargo.toml: direct `asupersync = "0.2.5"` → `"0.3.0"` in the
  fuzz target dependencies (cargo-fuzz uses its own manifest not tied
  to the workspace).
- Cargo.lock: refreshed via `cargo update` to resolve asupersync 0.3.0
  (and its transitive refresh — sha2/sha1/signal-hook et al.).
